short_summary: War ongoing; US-Iran deal distracts West
rationale: Active war continues at maximum background level; Iran deal uncertainty keeps US attention divided, a persistent concern for Ukrainian war support.

top_events.title: Russia-Ukraine war — active combat continues
top_events.summary: War on Ukrainian territory persists with ongoing strikes and frontline activity; no qualitative change but remains the defining reality of daily life.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: Continued US focus on Iran diplomacy keeps Western political bandwidth divided, potentially delaying or reducing attention to Ukrainian military aid needs.

top_events.title: Russian families use AI to 'resurrect' loved ones killed in Ukraine
top_events.summary: Story highlights the human cost of the war inside Russia; signals continued Russian casualties but no direct operational impact on Ukrainian daily life.
